title: Setup Project Repository & CI/CD
description: Configure GitHub repository, setup backend structure with FastAPI, and configure SonarCloud analysis workflow.

title: Design Database Schema & Models
description: Create SQLAlchemy models for Task management, define enums for task status, and configure PostgreSQL engine with SQLite fallback.

title: Implement REST API CRUD Endpoints
description: Build tasks router with GET, POST, PUT, and DELETE endpoints. Secure inputs using Pydantic schema validation.

title: Develop Kanban Board Frontend
description: Create React components for columns (Todo, In Progress, Done) and task cards using Tailwind CSS styling. Implement API requests via Axios.

title: Setup Vitest Frontend Tests
description: Write comprehensive unit and integration tests using Vitest and React Testing Library to verify UI behavior, task addition, and deletion.

title: Containerize Application using Docker
description: Create Dockerfile for both frontend and backend. Setup docker-compose.yml to run PostgreSQL database, backend, and frontend.

title: Perform Security Audit & SQL Injection Verification
description: Review SQL injection and HTML sanitization in schemas. Verify all inputs are stripped and trimmed correctly.
